usage_rules: Use Playfair Display for all major headings (H1-H3) to evoke a 'classic planner' feel.
Use Manrope for all UI elements, calendar dates, and data inputs for maximum legibility.
Captions/Labels must be uppercase with wide tracking (0.05em).

primary.description: Deep Navy - Used for primary actions, active states, and strong borders.

secondary.description: Imperial Red (Softened) - Used for 'Missed' states, alerts, or secondary highlights.

accent.description: Light Gold - RESERVED for 'Victory' states (100% completion) and premium highlights.

background.description: Warm Off-white - Main app background. Must feel like high-quality paper.

rules: NO DARK MODE for the main interface. The app must feel like a physical paper planner.
Use the 'Victory Gold' (#F2E6C9) ONLY when a user completes all habits for the day or achieves a streak.
Backgrounds must be #FAF9F7 (Warm Off-white), not pure #FFFFFF.
Cards and Calendar Cells can be #FFFFFF to create subtle depth against the #FAF9F7 background.

textures: Apply a subtle 'noise' texture (opacity 2-3%) over the entire app to simulate paper grain.
Use 'multiply' blend mode for text to make it look 'printed' on the screen.

borders.radius: rounded-none (for grid cells) or rounded-sm (for buttons) - Keep it sharp and disciplined.

buttons.primary: bg-navy text-white hover:bg-navy/90 rounded-sm px-6 py-2 font-medium transition-all
buttons.secondary: border border-navy text-navy hover:bg-navy/5 rounded-sm px-6 py-2 font-medium transition-all
buttons.ghost: text-navy/60 hover:text-navy hover:bg-navy/5 rounded-sm px-4 py-2 transition-all

calendar_grid.container: grid grid-cols-7 gap-px bg-border border border-border
calendar_grid.cell: bg-white aspect-square p-2 relative hover:bg-gray-50 transition-colors cursor-pointer group

layout.grid_system: Use a strict 7-column grid for the calendar. For the dashboard, use a 'Bento' style layout: Calendar (Dominant, col-span-5) + Habit List/Stats (Sidebar, col-span-2).
layout.spacing: Use generous padding (p-8, p-12) to create a sense of calm and focus. Avoid clutter.
layout.alignment: Center the calendar for focus. Left-align text for readability.

animations.check_mark: Scale up from 0 to 1 with a spring effect.
animations.victory_flash: Flash the cell background gold upon 100% completion.

motion.reduced_motion: Disable scale/slide effects, use opacity only.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text (#1C1C1C) on background (#FAF9F7) meets APCA standards.
accessibility.aria_labels: All calendar cells must have aria-labels (e.g., 'January 1st, 3 of 5 habits completed').

media.images: Use high-quality, minimalist photography. No generic 3D renders.

landing_hero.description: Minimalist desk setup with laptop and sunlight

planning_moment.description: Notebook with pen and smartphone, focus on planning

instructions_to_main_agent: 2. THEME: Configure tailwind.config.js with the custom colors (navy, imperial-red, victory-gold, paper).
3. FONTS: Import Playfair Display and Manrope from Google Fonts in index.css.
4. LAYOUT: Build the 'CalendarGrid' component first. It is the heart of the app. It must be a CSS Grid with 7 columns.
5. INTERACTION: The 'DayCell' must be clickable. Clicking opens a Modal (Dialog) to check off habits.
6. VICTORY: Implement the logic: If (completed_habits == total_habits) -> Apply 'bg-victory-gold' to the cell.
7. LANDING: Use the provided image URLs for the hero section. Keep the landing page text minimal and stoic.
8. ADMIN: The admin area should be functional but keep the same aesthetic. No 'bootstrap' admin templates.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: DO NOT use gradients. Use solid colors and whitespace.
Maintain the 'Paper Planner' aesthetic: Clean, sharp, disciplined.
